vocab.meaning: có mức giá cao hơn hẳn so với mặt bằng chung
vocab.example: Famous footwear brands command a premium because of their long-standing reputation and marketing.
I sometimes invest in high-end sneakers because they tend to hold their resale value quite well over time.

vocab.meaning: khẳng định/bảo chứng cho chất lượng của thứ gì
vocab.example: I can personally vouch for the quality of this brand; their shoes have lasted me for years without any wear and tear.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái không đối thủ/vượt trội
vocab.example: Designer athletic shoes often offer unrivaled comfort, making them worth the investment for long-distance runners.
Many young people buy certain labels to align themselves with a specific brand identity or lifestyle.
I prefer niche brands over mass-produced footwear to ensure that my style remains somewhat unique.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (tối ưu cho cơ thể người)
vocab.example: Top-tier brands prioritize ergonomic design, which helps in preventing foot fatigue during long work shifts.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề chế tác cẩu thả/kém chất lượng
vocab.example: By sticking to reputable names, I avoid the risk of shoddy workmanship often found in cheaper, no-name alternatives.

vocab.meaning: bền vững qua thử thách của thời gian
vocab.example: Classic leather boots from high-end labels are designed to stand the test of time, both in durability and style.

vocab.meaning: sự tiêu dùng nhằm phô trương (để thể hiện sự giàu có)
vocab.example: Buying overly expensive shoes with huge logos is often seen as a form of conspicuous consumption.
